training_status: able to increase frequency and intensity of workouts

benefits.description: Great improvement in hamstring pain and complete loss of pain in back.
Able to increase frequency and intensity of workouts during treatment.

side_effects.description: Severe lack of sensation developed, described as anhedonia (lack of emotional sensation during sex and general numbness).
Loss of emotional sensation, lack of effect from caffeine, felt like it would lead to depression if continued.

protocol_notes: Protocol maintained for couple months before stopping due to side effects. Hamstring pain improved for about 3 months duration. 8-year history of high hamstring pain. Considering retry in future if conditions worsen.
